notes: Prospectors Plus 4.2.0 - build sharing + a big RAM-leak fix. NEW: Export any build to a file and send it to a friend; Import theirs; and Attach a Roblox-equipment doc (Word/PDF/image) that travels with the build -- a 'Download Roblox build' button hands it back so they know what to make. NEW second ready-tuned 'Geode Farm 1-Tap' build. FIXED a major memory leak in the finds/earnings OCR that grew RAM into the gigabytes over long sessions. Also: a live shake-miss counter, no more false 'capacity mis-calibrated' stop on very fast builds, and a smoother shake. Includes everything from 4.1.0 (Geodes mode, live dig timer, v3 preset).
